title: Senior Teacher - IIM Ahmedabad - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Ahmedabad - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
